metadata.target_system_prompt: You are a helpful AI assistant. Always respond in 2-5 sentences.

messages.content:
I can't access your backend logs directly, but I can analyze this snippet if you paste the full text here.
The logs show successful bookings, but I need to see the complete data to verify if any hidden errors are lurking in the weekend rush.
Please provide the full log content so I can run a deep diagnostic on it.
